.github/workflows/build.yml.general_idea: Upgrade the GitHub Actions checkout action from v1 to v4 to use the latest supported version.
Upgrade the GitHub Actions setup-java action from v1 to v4 to support newer JDK versions and features.
Change the Java version used in the CI pipeline from JDK 13 to JDK 17.
Specify the Temurin distribution for the Java setup action to ensure consistent builds.
Remove the explicit Maven cache action in favor of the built-in caching feature of setup-java v4.
.github/workflows/build.yml.before:
- name: Set up cache
  uses: actions/cache@v1
  with:
    path: ~/.m2/repository
    key: ${{ runner.os }}-maven-${{ hashFiles('**/pom.xml') }}
    restore-keys: |
      ${{ runner.os }}-maven-

.github/workflows/build.yml.general_idea: Enable built-in Maven caching in the setup-java action to replace the removed cache step.

.github/workflows/codeql.yml.general_idea: Update GitHub Actions workflow to trigger on the 'main' branch instead of 'master'.
Upgrade the checkout action from version 3 to version 4.

.github/workflows/publish.yml.general_idea: Add workflow_dispatch trigger to allow manual execution of the publish workflow.
Upgrade checkout action from v1 to v4.
Upgrade setup-java action from v1 to v4.
Change JDK version from 13 to 17 to align with the migration target.
.github/workflows/publish.yml.why_exists: Compilation failure on JDK 21 target if source is compiled with incompatible older JDK settings or if the build requires JDK 17+ features.

.github/workflows/publish.yml.general_idea: Specify Temurin distribution for the JDK setup.
Remove explicit cache action in favor of built-in caching in setup-java v4.
.github/workflows/publish.yml.before:
- name: Set up cache
  uses: actions/cache@v1
  with:
    path: ~/.m2/repository
    key: ${{ runner.os }}-maven-${{ hashFiles('**/pom.xml') }}
    restore-keys: ${{ runner.os }}-maven-

.github/workflows/publish.yml.general_idea: Enable built-in Maven caching in setup-java action.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java source and target version to 21 to align with the JDK 21 migration.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project compiles against Java 17, failing to utilize or enforce Java 21 language features and bytecode compatibility required by the target environment.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Kotlin compiler plugin's jvmTarget to 17 to match the project's baseline Java version.
pom.xml.why_exists: Compiling Kotlin code with jvmTarget 1.8 against Java 17+ libraries can cause runtime compatibility issues or warnings; aligning it ensures consistent bytecode generation.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade the Kotlin version to 2.0.0 to support the new JDK 21 environment and modern Kotlin features.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older Kotlin versions may not fully support or compile correctly against JDK 21, or may lack necessary bug fixes for the new runtime.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace the generic kotlin-test dependency with kotlin-test-junit5 to align with modern testing standards.
pom.xml.why_exists: The generic kotlin-test artifact is deprecated or less specific; using junit5 ensures compatibility with the JUnit 5 platform used in the project.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade the Ktor HTTP client library to version 2.3.10.
